title: INR18650-LG-3500-MJ1 Anode Data Preprocessing Collection
author: Kuhn, Yannick
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Scope 
 This collection contains records with workflows that apply the cycling protocol to the structure of the GITT data from a harvested negative electrode (anode) of the INR18650-MJ1 cylindrical Li-ion battery cell manufactured by LG CHEM. These workflows are intended to process and package raw data as structured tabular data. 
 Records 
 
 
 
 Relationship 
 Name 
 Description 
 Usage 
 
 
 
 
  hasPart  
  INR18650-LG-3500-MJ1 Anode GITT Data Preprocessing  
 Workflow for preprocessing GITT data for the MJ1 anode. 
 Used to clean and prepare GITT data for further analysis. 
 
 
  hasPart  
  INR18650-LG-3500-MJ1 Anode GITT+EIS Data Preprocessing  
 Workflow for preprocessing GITT and EIS data for the MJ1 anode. 
 Used to integrate GITT and EIS data for model parameterization and analysis. 
 
 
  hasPart  
  INR18650-LG-3500-MJ1 Anode EIS Data Preprocessing  
 Workflow for preprocessing EIS data for the MJ1 anode. 
 Used to clean and prepare EIS data for subsequent electrochemical analysis. 
 
 
 
 Associated Resources 
      
 
 
  Relationship  
  Record  
  Description  
 
 
  isPartOf  
  INR18650-LG-3500-MJ1 Anode  
 This collection points to all the intermediate steps including and between the data obtained on the harvested anode of the MJ1 cylindrical 18650 cell from LG CHEM and its analysis. 
 
 
 
 Licensing 
 See the individual records for licensing information 
 Contact Information 
 For questions or further assistance, please contact Dennis Kopljar at dennis.kopljar@dlr.de. 
 References 
 This dataset is linked to the following publication: [DOI/Link to publication].
